# function: op_not

The logical NOT operation. Represents a logical NOT of a single operation. Can be used to negate other operations such as `op_and`, `op_or`, `op_not`, `op_status_code_check`, `op_header_check`, or `op_jsonpath`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::op_not(
    provider::sentry::op_header_check(
      # Key
      "equals",
      provider::sentry::op_header_operand_literal("X-Header-Key"),
      # Value
      "equals",
      provider::sentry::op_header_operand_glob("pattern-*"),
    ),
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
op_not(operand string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `operand` (String) The operation to negate.
